dashboard.title: Kanban Fundamentals
dashboard.subtitle: Master Kanban principles through interactive simulations, real data, and hands-on practice. Work through each section to earn badges and a certificate of completion.

welcome.title: Welcome & Learning Objectives
welcome.description: Course overview, how the platform works, and what you'll achieve by the end.

why-kanban.title: Why Kanban?
why-kanban.description: Tell us about your role and goals. Your answers help us tailor the experience.

history.title: A Brief History
history.description: From queuing theory and Toyota to modern knowledge work — how we got here.

industry-today.title: Kanban in Industry Today
industry-today.description: Real-world applications across software, healthcare, marketing, and beyond.

kanban-principles.title: Kanban Principles & Strategy
kanban-principles.description: The definition, the goal (effective, predictable, efficient), the Toyota Production System, and the three core practices.

penny-game.title: Batch Size & Flow
penny-game.description: The Penny Game — discover how batch size affects lead time, throughput, and flow.

littles-law.title: Little's Law
littles-law.description: Run a drive-through simulation and see why Cycle Time = WIP ÷ Throughput changes everything.

kanban-game.title: The Kanban Game
kanban-game.description: Three rounds on a full Kanban board — WIP limits, work item age, and flow analysis across rounds.

pull-vs-push.title: Pull vs Push Systems
pull-vs-push.description: Compare push and pull systems side by side and see how pull creates natural self-regulation.

flow-metrics.title: Flow Metrics & Forecasting
flow-metrics.description: Monte Carlo simulation, throughput analysis, right-sizing, and probability-based forecasting with real data.

workflow-definition.title: Defining the Workflow
workflow-definition.description: The six minimum elements every Kanban system needs. Identify them on the Kanban Game board.

workflow-scenarios.title: Identifying Workflows
workflow-scenarios.description: Spot workflow elements in real-world systems: drive-throughs, software teams, and more.

board-designer.title: Design Your Board
board-designer.description: Build a fully customised Kanban board with columns, swimlanes, WIP limits, and explicit policies.

applying-littles-law.title: Applying Little's Law
applying-littles-law.description: Use Little's Law to forecast a real release — and discover what the numbers actually tell you.

flow-metrics-deep-dive.title: Flow Metrics Deep Dive
flow-metrics-deep-dive.description: Explore your Kanban Game data through cycle time, throughput, WIP, and aging charts.

board-analysis.title: Board Analysis
board-analysis.description: Analyse four Kanban board scenarios and identify what's happening in each system.

workflow-improvements.title: Defining Workflow Improvements
workflow-improvements.description: Match flow metrics to workflow elements and determine what to measure and improve.

littles-law-applied.title: Applying Little’s Law
littles-law-applied.description: Use Little’s Law as a diagnostic tool. Analyze real-world scenarios and expose impossible promises.

closing.title: Wrap-Up & Certificate
closing.description: Myth or Fact challenge, personal reflection, feedback, and your certificate of completion.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your Kanban training
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a login link

chat.title: Training Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about Kanban
chat.emptyPrompt: Ask me anything about the training material
chat.q3: How does Monte Carlo forecasting work?

quiz.passMessage: Well done! You've demonstrated a solid understanding.
quiz.failMessage: Review the lesson content and try again when you're ready.
